metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_2038
metadata.comment:
Rationale: "mAb-GlyRβ revealed immunoreactive puncta along the dendrites and on the somata of SCNs. B-D: Double-labeling with mAb-GlyRβ and a VIAAT antibody revealed significant apposition of GlyRβ puncta to inhibitory nerve terminals. E-G: Additionally, GlyRβ staining colocalized with gephyrin clusters detected by a polyclonal antibody."

18/02/2021 Dnyanada: The high degree of colocalisation of GlyRβ puncta with gephyrin make it suitable for a specific ontology term "postsynaptic specialization" (previously annotated to the term "synapse").. Experimental description: "Synaptic localization of mAb-GlyRβ immunoreactivity in cultured rat spinal neurons"

checks.label: OWL Consistency
